category_sources: Official ncurses homepage describes ncurses as a curses library for character-cell terminals.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title uses NCURSES / New Curses.
docs_sources: Official ncurses homepage links manual pages and INSTALL documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official ncurses announcement page.
repo_sources: Official ncurses homepage links this GitHub repository as a repository built from ncurses development patches and selected releases.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a text-based UI library.
source_facts.executables lists terminfo and terminal utilities such as tic, infocmp, tput, and clear.
